description: Composition Indigo splashed jeans made of a cotton and lycra blend fabric for stretchability, has two insert pockets on the front with a patch pocket inside the right one, two patch pockets on the back with thread detailing, brand badge on the right pocket at the back, loops on the waist, and has a metal zipper and button closure Fit Regular fit Mid rise Straight leg Wash care Turn inside out before washing and drying Machine wash cold separately using a mild detergent as colour may bleed Do not bleach or wring Tumble dry or dry flat in shade Warm iron If you're a denim person, then these light indigo splashed jeans from wrangler are perfect for you. With a mid waist and great regular fit, this pair looks on trend and stays comfortable all day. Team this with semi-formal shirts and suede boots or funky t-shirts and canvas shoes for unparalleled cool. Model statistics The model wears trousers of length 44" Height: 6', Waist: 32", Hips: 40"
